conditioning: ANALYTIC (isolating): tense/aspect is a free PREVERBAL PARTICLE, not an affix; particles are optional and stack

fit_none.note: vie has no inflectional tense; these three free particles ARE the tense/aspect system

evidence_citations.claim: tense is marked by free preverbal particles

prose: vie (isolating) marks tense/aspect with FREE PREVERBAL PARTICLES, not affixes: đã (past/perfective), sẽ (future), đang (progressive). Recovered from each particle's alignment to an English tense word (sẽ→will, đã→have, đang→was). This is the analytic mirror of suffixal TAM. Recommendation: PROMOTE đã/sẽ/đang as the analytic tense system.
